summary: Iteration 32: Complete testing of Restaurant POS Cashier Interface. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend POS interface fully functional with menu grid, categories, modifiers, cart, VAT calculation, and all 4 payment methods.

issues: Payment buttons (Cash, Card, Online, Credit) appear at bottom of cart panel - may need scrolling on smaller screens to see all 4 buttons

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/cashier/login - successful login with admin credentials (200)
Backend: POST /api/cashier/login - invalid credentials rejected (401)
Backend: POST /api/cashier/login - missing fields rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/cashier/categories - returns 7 categories (all, popular, main, appetizer, beverage, dessert, sides)
Backend: GET /api/cashier/menu - returns 26 menu items
Backend: GET /api/cashier/menu?category=main - filters by category
Backend: Menu items have correct modifier structure (name, options with price)
Backend: POST /api/cashier/seed-menu - seeds sample menu data
Backend: POST /api/cashier/orders - creates order with cash payment
Backend: POST /api/cashier/orders - creates order with modifiers
Backend: POST /api/cashier/orders - creates order with discount (10%)
Backend: VAT (15%) calculation verified correct
Backend: GET /api/cashier/orders - returns orders list
Backend: GET /api/cashier/customers - returns customers for credit selection
Backend: POST /api/cashier/customers/quick - creates customer quickly
Backend: GET /api/cashier/stats - returns today's sales statistics
Backend: POST /api/cashier/orders/{id}/send-kitchen - sends order to kitchen
Frontend: Cashier login page loads at /cashier
Frontend: Login form has email, password, submit button with data-testid
Frontend: Successful login redirects to /cashier/pos
Frontend: POS interface loads with Restaurant POS title
Frontend: All 7 categories displayed (All Items, Popular, Main Dishes, Appetizers, Beverages, Desserts, Sides)
Frontend: 26 menu items displayed in grid layout
Frontend: Menu items show name, Arabic name, price, and 'Has options' badge
Frontend: Clicking item with modifiers opens modifier dialog
Frontend: Modifier dialog shows Size (Regular/Large +SAR 8) and Extras options
Frontend: Items added to cart with quantity controls
Frontend: Cart shows Subtotal, VAT (15%), and Total
Frontend: Payment buttons (Cash, Card, Online, Credit) visible
Frontend: Cash payment completes order and shows order number
Frontend: Order Complete dialog shows Print and Kitchen buttons
Frontend: Credit payment opens 'Select Customer for Credit' dialog
Frontend: Customer selection dialog shows searchable customer list
Frontend: Today's Sales and Orders count displayed in header
Frontend: Logout button available
critical_code_review_comments: All Cashier POS endpoints properly implemented with JWT authentication
Menu seeding creates 26 items across 6 categories with modifiers
VAT calculation at 15% is correct in both backend and frontend
Credit payment properly requires customer selection before order creation
Order creation updates sales records for reporting
Send to kitchen creates notification for kitchen display
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Menu already has 26 seeded items from previous setup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 complete. Cashier POS system fully tested: (1) Login at /cashier with separate cashier_token authentication; (2) POS at /cashier/pos with Foodics-style menu grid; (3) 7 categories (All, Popular, Main, Appetizers, Beverages, Desserts, Sides); (4) 26 menu items with modifiers (Size with +SAR pricing, Extras as multiple selection); (5) Cart with Subtotal, VAT 15%, Total; (6) 4 payment methods - Cash, Card, Online, Credit; (7) Credit requires customer selection; (8) Order completion shows order number with Print and Kitchen buttons. All backend APIs working correctly.
